description: BMI (body mass index) from height and weight
source:
(calculator
 {:title "BMI calculator"
  :description "Body mass index from height and weight."
  :inputs [{:id :weight-kg :label "Weight" :type :number :default 70 :min 0 :unit "kg"}
           {:id :height-cm :label "Height" :type :number :default 170 :min 0 :unit "cm"}]
  :outputs [{:id :bmi :label "BMI" :format [:decimal]}
            {:id :category :label "Category" :format [:unit ""]}]
  :compute (fn [{:keys [weight-kg height-cm]}]
             (let [height-m (/ height-cm 100)
                   bmi (/ weight-kg (* height-m height-m))]
               {:bmi bmi
                :category (cond
                            (< bmi 18.5) 0
                            (< bmi 25) 1
                            (< bmi 30) 2
                            :else 3)}))
  :logic (fn [{:keys [weight-kg height-cm]} out]
           [{:step "Height in meters" :formula "height-cm / 100" :value (/ height-cm 100)}
            {:step "BMI" :formula "weight-kg / height-m^2" :value (:bmi out)}
            {:assumption "Uses the standard adult BMI formula; not valid for children."}])})

description: mortgage payments with extra principal payments
source:
(calculator
 {:title "Mortgage payment"
  :description "Monthly payment for a fixed-rate mortgage, with optional extra principal."
  :inputs [{:id :principal :label "Loan amount" :type :number :default 300000 :min 0 :unit "$"}
           {:id :rate :label "Annual interest rate" :type :number :default 6.5 :min 0 :max 30 :unit "%"}
           {:id :years :label "Term" :type :select :default 30
            :options [{:value 15 :label "15 years"} {:value 30 :label "30 years"}]}
           {:id :extra :label "Extra monthly payment" :type :number :default 0 :min 0 :unit "$"}]
  :outputs [{:id :payment :label "Monthly payment" :format [:currency "USD"]}
            {:id :total-interest :label "Total interest paid" :format [:currency "USD"]}
            {:id :payoff-months :label "Months to payoff" :format [:integer]}]
  :compute (fn [{:keys [principal rate years extra]}]
             (let [r (/ rate 100 12)
                   n (* years 12)
                   payment (if (zero? r)
                             (/ principal n)
                             (/ (* principal r) (- 1 (Math/pow (+ 1 r) (- n)))))
                   total-payment (+ payment extra)
                   ;; Hard iteration cap (100 years of months) checked first,
                   ;; independent of any derived quantity like n -- a wrong
                   ;; payment/rate combination must still terminate.
                   max-months 1200]
               (loop [balance principal months 0 interest-paid 0]
                 (if (or (>= months max-months) (<= balance 0))
                   {:payment payment :total-interest interest-paid :payoff-months months}
                   (let [interest (* balance r)
                         principal-paid (min balance (- total-payment interest))]
                     (recur (- balance principal-paid) (inc months) (+ interest-paid interest)))))))
  :logic (fn [{:keys [principal rate years] :as in} out]
           [{:step "Monthly rate" :formula "r = annual rate / 100 / 12" :value (/ rate 100 12)}
            {:step "Payment (amortization formula)" :formula "P*r / (1 - (1+r)^-n)" :value (:payment out)}
            {:step "Months to payoff" :formula "amortization loop with extra principal applied each month, capped at 1200 months" :value (:payoff-months out)}
            {:assumption "Fixed rate; interest compounds monthly; extra payment applied to principal each month."}])})

description: shipping cost by package weight and delivery speed
source:
(calculator
 {:title "Shipping cost"
  :description "Shipping cost from package weight and chosen delivery speed."
  :inputs [{:id :weight-lb :label "Package weight" :type :number :default 5 :min 0 :unit "lbs"}
           {:id :speed :label "Delivery speed" :type :select :default "standard"
            :options [{:value "standard" :label "Standard (5-7 days)"}
                      {:value "expedited" :label "Expedited (2-3 days)"}
                      {:value "overnight" :label "Overnight"}]}]
  :outputs [{:id :cost :label "Shipping cost" :format [:currency "USD"]}]
  :compute (fn [{:keys [weight-lb speed]}]
             (let [base 4.99
                   per-lb (case speed "standard" 0.5 "expedited" 1.25 "overnight" 3.0 0.5)
                   speed-fee (case speed "standard" 0 "expedited" 12 "overnight" 28 0)]
               {:cost (+ base speed-fee (* per-lb weight-lb))}))
  :logic (fn [{:keys [weight-lb speed]} out]
           [{:step "Base fee" :formula "flat $4.99 handling fee" :value 4.99}
            {:step "Weight + speed surcharge" :formula "per-lb rate * weight, plus a flat speed fee" :value (:cost out)}
            {:assumption "Domestic shipping only; per-lb rates and speed fees are illustrative flat rates."}])})

(calculator
 {:title "Days between dates"
  :description "Number of days between a start and end date."
  :inputs [{:id :start :label "Start date" :type :date :default "2026-01-01"}
           {:id :end :label "End date" :type :date :default "2026-12-31"}]
  :outputs [{:id :days :label "Days between" :format [:integer]}]
  :compute (fn [{:keys [start end]}]
             (letfn [(parse-date [s]
                       (let [dash1 (clojure.string/index-of s "-")
                             dash2 (clojure.string/index-of s "-" (inc dash1))]
                         [(parse-double (subs s 0 dash1))
                          (parse-double (subs s (inc dash1) dash2))
                          (parse-double (subs s (inc dash2)))]))
                     (days-since-epoch [[y m d]]
                       (let [a (quot (- 14 m) 12)
                             yy (- (+ y 4800) a)
                             mm (+ m (* 12 a) -3)]
                         (+ d
                            (quot (+ (* 153 mm) 2) 5)
                            (* 365 yy)
                            (quot yy 4)
                            (- (quot yy 100))
                            (quot yy 400)
                            -32045)))]
               {:days (Math/abs (- (days-since-epoch (parse-date end)) (days-since-epoch (parse-date start))))}))
  :logic (fn [{:keys [start end]} out]
           [{:step "Days between" :formula "proleptic-Gregorian day number of end minus start" :value (:days out)}
            {:assumption "Both dates are in YYYY-MM-DD form and the Gregorian calendar."}])})
